puzzle.hint: This verse encourages perseverance and assures believers of divine recompense for their righteous deeds.
puzzle.arabic: وَٱصْبِرْ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يُضِيعُ أَجْرَ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
puzzle.verseEn: And be patient, for indeed, Allāh does not allow to be lost the reward of those who do good.
